review.summary: Failed to parse review JSON: Expected ',' or ']' after array element in JSON at position 12927 (line 110 column 6)
review.raw_response:

{
  "approval_status": "changes_requested",
  "summary": "The code has several significant issues: the `saveSession` function is truncated (incomplete), there are missing error handlers for API calls that can cause silent failures, the `onDiscoveryStateChange` dependency in useEffect will cause infinite re-renders if not memoized by the parent, and the greeting typewriter timeout uses a timing heuristic that can skip the greeting entirely for short messages. The known coach persona persistence bug is present in this codebase.",
  "issues": [
    {
      "severity": "critical",
      "location": "saveSession function (end of file)",
      "description": "The `saveSession` function is truncated — the file ends mid-function without closing braces. This means the module will fail to parse entirely, breaking the entire component.",
      "fix": "Complete the `saveSession` function with proper return statement and closing braces, and complete the main `LensIntake` component export."
    },
    {
      "severity": "critical",
      "location": "DiscoveryPhase useEffect for onDiscoveryStateChange",
      "description": "The useEffect that persists discovery state includes `onDiscoveryStateChange` in its dependency array and is triggered by every state change (`subPhase`, `currentSection`, `messages`, `sectionData`, etc.). If the parent component passes a non-memoized callback (e.g., an inline arrow function), this will create an infinite render loop. Even if memoized, this effect fires on EVERY message addition, section change, etc., with no debouncing — potentially calling localStorage.setItem on every keystroke-triggered state change.",
      "fix": "Wrap `onDiscoveryStateChange` in a useCallback at the parent level and add debouncing to the persistence effect. Also consider removing `onDiscoveryStateChange` from the dependency array and using a ref instead.",
      "code_snippet": "const onDiscoveryStateChangeRef = useRef(onDiscoveryStateChange);\nonDiscoveryStateChangeRef.current = onDiscoveryStateChange;\n\nuseEffect(() => {\n  const timer = setTimeout(() => {\n    if (onDiscoveryStateChangeRef.current && subPhase !== 'preview') {\n      onDiscoveryStateChangeRef.current({ subPhase, currentSection, messages, sectionData, greetingDone, sectionComplete, lensDoc });\n    }\n  }, 500);\n  return () => clearTimeout(timer);\n}, [subPhase, currentSection, messages, sectionData, greetingDone, sectionComplete, lensDoc]);"
    },
    {
      "severity": "critical",
      "location": "DiscoveryPhase - callClaude, startSection, sendMessage, generateLens, mergeUpdatedSection",
      "description": "No error handling on any API call. If `/api/chat` returns an error, the `data.content?.[0]?.text` fallback returns empty string, which gets silently added as an empty assistant message. If the fetch itself fails (network error), the promise rejects with no catch, leaving `loading` stuck at `true` permanently — the user can never type again.",
